tagline: Leak-proof, planet-positive drinkware for life on the move.
value_props: Recycled stainless steel and BPA/BPS-free materials
Leak-proof designs tested for commuting and air travel
Temperature retention up to 24 hours cold / 12 hours hot
Lifetime warranty and low-cost parts replacement
1% for the Planet donor; seasonal limited-run artist editions
mission: Cut single-use cups and bottles in half by 2030 through durable, stylish drinkware and climate-positive logistics.
audiences: College students and campus sustainability clubs
Outdoor day hikers and weekend campers
Eco-conscious gift buyers and corporate gifting managers

market.distribution: DTC via Shopify, select Pacific Northwest boutiques, small B2B/corporate gifting

founder.name: Mia Thompson
founder.title: Founder & CEO
founder.background: Former airline operations manager who witnessed the waste generated by single-use cups and bottles across airports daily.
story_hooks: Designed first prototypes after tracking 30+ leaks during a 3-month commuting diary.
Built carbon-neutral shipping habit after a turbulence incident that spilled coffee and inspired the lock-lid focus.
Committed to 1% for the Planet after her hometown river cleanup project in Portland.
founder.quote: We design for the 7am bus and the 7pm red-eye—reliable, climate-positive, and never leaky.

operations.carbon_neutral_shipping: Verified through Shopify Planet and third-party offset projects (reforestation + clean cookstoves).
operations.repairs: Low-cost replacement parts program and mail-in lid refurbish service.
operations.packaging: 100% recycled paper, soy inks, no plastic fillers.

timing_priorities_2026: Memorial Day weekend (start of summer travel)
partnerships: Local Portland refill stations map pilot with cafes
Campus ambassador program soft-launch at three universities
notes_for_pr: Strong founder narrative, credible sustainability operations, and commuter/travel proof points. Prioritize travel, sustainability, and product roundups; build toward national business coverage with data-led story.
